creator: pav@FreeBSD.org
text:
> > This looks exactly as a startup crash I fixed 5 weeks ago.
> > Can you tell us which version of gimp port you have, exactly?
> 
> Latest from ports (both glib and gimpshop)
> 
> $ pkg_info -Ix gimpshop ^glib-2
> gimpshop-2.2.11_1   GIMP fork resembling Adobe Photoshop
> glib-2.12.4         Some useful routines of C programming (current stable 

Oh! It's not gimp but gimpshop. What the hell is gimpshop? :)

Can you try to take /usr/ports/graphics/gimp/files/patch-plug-ins.c,
stick it into the gimpshop port and test if it helps?

-- 
Pav Lucistnik <pav@oook.cz>
              <pav@FreeBSD.org>

EMACS: Eight Megabytes And Continually Swapping
